title: Amtech H2150 280mm (11") Heavy Duty caulking Gun
features: HEAVY DUTY: This 280mm (11") caulking gun has a heavy duty powder coated steel frame with a cast aluminium trigger handle and a plunger and release lever and features a hexagon rod with a hooked end.
FITS MOST CARTRIDGES: It is suitable for use with most standard cartridges of acrylics, silicones, MS polymers and adhesives
SIZE CAPACITY: 11 inch / 280 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech caulking gun. Powder coated steel skeleton frame. Hexagon rod with hooked end. handle with plunger and release lever. Suitable for use with most standard cartridges. Measures approx 11-inch (275mm) length. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Caulking Gun See more
